my_role: Built an exact-scale miniature ice rink model; then disassembled a freezer to demonstrate the refrigeration cycle—extracted and safely disposed of freon while teaching how cooling pipes allow water to freeze.
skills: Laser Cutting, laser etching, acrylic bending, refrigeration systems, freon handling
tools: Laser Cutter, Heat gun, Sharpie, HVAC tools
outcomes: 56M views, demonstrated refrigeration cycle principles

my_role: Engineered a pneumatic arm inspired by stunt air ramps to launch basketballs with precision. Designed the system to achieve both free throws and 3-pointers with high repeatability by adjusting air pressure using plywood and steel construction.
skills: Pneumatics engineering, mechanical design, air pressure control, precision tuning, structural engineering
tools: Pneumatic components, air compressor, plywood, steel, welding equipment, fabrication tools
outcomes: 37M views, achieved repeatable free throw and 3-pointer shots with precision air pressure adjustment

my_role: Wrote a Python script to control 7 3D printers simultaneously; converting MIDI files into stepper motor movements that generated acoustic music from the printer mechanics.
skills: Python programming, MIDI file parsing, stepper motor control, 3D printer firmware, music synthesis
tools: Python, 3D printers (7x), stepper motors, MIDI libraries, firmware customization
outcomes: 20M views, successfully converted MIDI files to acoustic music across 7 coordinated printers

my_role: Modified a cricket ball with sand filling to act as a deadblow hammer; eliminating bounce. Built a remote-controlled solenoid stump ejector system triggered by button press. Integrated 18650 batteries into the stump's confined space and designed polycarbonate stumps to prevent shattering during normal play.
skills: Electronics design, embedded systems, battery integration, remote control systems, mechanical design, materials engineering
tools: 18650 batteries, solenoid actuators, polycarbonate, remote control modules, soldering equipment, electronics assembly tools
outcomes: 95M views, demonstrated cricket physics manipulation with functioning remote stump ejector system

my_role: Spent 3 months iterating an Edison-inspired phonograph design based on academic research. Designed everything in Fusion 360 with meticulous precision; incorporating 3D printing; woodworking; and ACME lead screws chosen over threaded rod for superior straightness and accuracy.
skills: CAD design (Fusion 360), mechanical engineering, precision manufacturing, woodworking, mechanism design, technical research synthesis
tools: Fusion 360, 3D printer, woodworking tools, ACME lead screws, precision measurement instruments
outcomes: 71M views, successfully recreated Edison phonograph with modern precision manufacturing after 3 months of iterative design

my_role: Built a helmet water fountain using dual peristaltic pumps offset 30 degrees out of phase to overcome pressure loss and sputtering over a 30-foot distance. Integrated the pumping system into a water fountain dispenser for a visually striking effect.
skills: Pump system design, pressure engineering, fluid dynamics, pump synchronization, enclosure design
tools: Peristaltic pumps (2x), water fountain dispenser, tubing/plumbing components, electrical integration, timing controls
outcomes: 48M views, solved long-distance pressure and sputtering issues with dual offset pump synchronization

my_role: Engineered an airbag-powered ping pong ball launching system across 30 coordinated trashcans. Tested multiple launch mechanisms before settling on airbags with cinder block weights and cardboard impact dampers. Built a relay matrix system with precise timing/firing diagrams to synchronize all 30 trashcans despite limited relay availability.
skills: Pneumatics engineering, relay logic and control systems, timing coordination, electrical systems design, mechanical iteration and testing
tools: Airbags, cinder blocks, cardboard, relay circuits, electrical control modules, timing circuits, testing equipment
outcomes: 254M views (most-viewed project), successfully synchronized 30 airbag-powered trashcans using relay matrix timing system

my_role: Designed control systems for 40 air cannons filled with confetti; using a relay matrix coordination approach. Built timing and firing diagrams to synchronize all 40 pneumatic cannons for a coordinated celebration effect.
skills: Relay logic and control systems, timing coordination, pneumatics engineering, electrical systems design, multi-device synchronization
tools: Air cannons (40x), confetti, relay circuits, electrical control modules, timing circuits, pneumatic components
outcomes: 125M views, successfully coordinated 40 air cannons with confetti using relay matrix timing system

my_role: Conducted in-depth research into sonar imaging systems; ROV/AUV operations; and underwater exploration techniques. tools: Sonar documentation, ROV/AUV technical resources, underwater exploration literature, research databases

tools: Rocket motors, mathematical simulation software (Python/MATLAB), CAD software, CNC/fabrication equipment, testing and measurement tools

my_role: Created multiple physics demonstration builds: designed and 3D printed an ellipse with interior mirror film lining and motorized laser holder to demonstrate focal point reflection principles; designed and built a 6-foot scaled longboard with wheels and grip tape; rigged a 6-foot fan on a boat with a sail and camping batteries to test self-propulsion via blown sail.

my_role: Designed a quick-swap aluminum extrusion rail mount system enabling three interchangeable wheelchair modes: (1) Party mode with motorized disco ball; (2) Car horn mode activated by button press; (3) Nerf battle mode with dual large nerf guns mounted on servos that swing up over shoulders with auto-firing. Integrated all systems to the wheelchair's 48V onboard battery with voltage step-down converters for each device.

tools: Aluminum extrusion, servo motors, linear actuators, motor controllers, disco ball motor, car horn, nerf guns, voltage converters/buck converters, 48V wheelchair battery, electronics assembly
outcomes: 56M views, created three fully functional interchangeable wheelchair attachment modes, demonstrated accessibility-focused engineering with fun features, all powered from onboard battery

my_role: First project working with Mark Rober's team. Provided on-set support and learned about discrete mechanical systems; timing mechanisms; and solenoid-based control systems used in the arcade game-winning device.

Designed and implemented a real-time alert system using Twilio API that notifies when a box loses connection; enabling pre-theft box resets. Managed production logistics and fleet-wide equipment maintenance.

tools: Manufacturing and assembly tools, hidden cameras, Twilio API, GPS/connectivity sensors, electronics testing equipment, fleet management systems

Built a Simon Says robot using Raspberry Pi with a camera module for color detection. Integrated servos with drum sticks and a mechanical hand that detects when lights turn on and slaps the corresponding color. Programmed sequence learning logic enabling the robot to remember patterns and beat the game.

Field-tested all 40 units for reliability.

Successfully demonstrated precise 90-degree; 180-degree; and arbitrary angle rotations to show any desired orientation.

tools: Raincoat material, rubber cement, waterproofing supplies, testing equipment, historical references

my_role: Designed and built a massive density demonstration wall—possibly the world's largest—to visually demonstrate how different liquids have different densities. Conducted FEA (Finite Element Analysis) to calculate structural integrity and determine the thinnest acrylic that could safely withstand the pressure. Optimized material selection to minimize thickness while ensuring safety.

tools: FEA software, CAD software, acrylic materials, fabrication equipment, testing equipment, various density liquids
